title: Sold a property in FY 2025-26? Why paying the flat 12.5% LTCG tax without indexation could save you more
summary: Many property sellers may end up paying more tax under the 20% tax regime with indexation than under the flat 12.5% LTCG tax. The benefit of indexation depends on how much the property's value has appreciated over time, making it important to compare both tax calculations before filing.

title: From Ketan Parekh scam to Covid: What 25 years of history reveals about ideal asset allocation during market downturns
summary: A portfolio invested entirely in equities typically suffers the deepest drawdowns, whereas adding debt investments can substantially reduce losses during market corrections.

title: IT Department launches Foreign Assets Information report: Here's what it shows and how taxpayers can download it
summary: The Income Tax Department has introduced a Foreign Assets Information (FAI) report on its Compliance Portal. Taxpayers can securely download their foreign asset information in a password-protected PDF, review the reported details, and submit feedback if they identify any discrepancies.

title: Crypto in your portfolio? Experts share key disclosures and compliance tips for ITR filing

title: The 10-10-10 SIP rule: A simple formula for long-term wealth creation
summary: The 10-10-10 SIP rule helps investors build long-term wealth by investing for 10 years, assuming 10% annual returns and increasing SIP contributions by 10% each year. Learn how step-up SIPs can create a larger corpus through disciplined investing and compounding.
